Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, date_trunc('month', date_add('second', -900, resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.timestamp)) AS timestamp, count(distinct(bs.bldg_id)) AS sample_count, (count(distinct(bs.bldg_id)) * sum(bs.weight)) / CAST(sum(1) AS DECIMAL) AS units_count, sum(1) / CAST(count(distinct(bs.bldg_id)) AS DECIMAL) AS rows_per_sample, sum(resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption", sum(resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.upgrade = 1 AND resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.state IN ('CO', 'WY') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/826782cc4367cb5a3fad8f858555007c813c66b92207366fdccefad7fab248e4/79c93583-10d6-44d3-a2ba-36d3dd9335d7/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
